questions.question: Which letter does this sign represent?
Which letter does this sign represent?
How do you sign the letter B in ISL?
options: Make a fist with thumb resting on the side.
Hold all four fingers straight up, thumb folded across palm.
Curve fingers and thumb to form the letter C.
Curl all fingers down, thumb tucked under.
questions.answer: Hold all four fingers straight up, thumb folded across palm.

questions.question: Which letter does this sign represent?
How do you sign the letter E in ISL?
options: Index finger points up, other fingers form a circle.
Make a fist with thumb on the side.
Curl all fingers down, thumb tucked under.
questions.answer: Curl all fingers down, thumb tucked under.

questions.question: Which letter does this sign represent?
How do you sign the letter G?
options: Pinky finger raised, other fingers folded.
Index and middle finger point sideways together.
Index finger and thumb point sideways.
Touch index finger to thumb, other fingers extended.
questions.answer: Index finger and thumb point sideways.

questions.question: Which letter does this sign represent?
How do you sign the letter J?
options: Index finger traces a J in the air.
Pinky raised and trace a J motion.
questions.answer: Pinky raised and trace a J motion.

questions.question: Which letter does this sign represent?
How do you sign the letter L?
options: Index finger up, thumb out forming an L shape.
Index and middle finger up, thumb between them.
questions.answer: Index finger up, thumb out forming an L shape.

questions.question: Which letter does this sign represent?
How do you sign the letter M?
options: Index and middle finger up, thumb between them.
All fingers and thumb curved to form O.

questions.question: Which letter does this sign represent?
How do you sign the letter N?
options: All fingers curved to form O.

questions.question: Which letter does this sign represent?
How do you sign the letter S?
options: Thumb between index and middle finger.

questions.question: Which letter does this sign represent?
How do you sign the letter P?
options: Index finger points down, middle finger out, thumb to side.
questions.answer: Index finger points down, middle finger out, thumb to side.

questions.question: Which letter does this sign represent?
How do you sign the letter V?
options: Index and middle fingers up together.
Index and middle fingers up, spread apart.
questions.answer: Index and middle fingers up, spread apart.

questions.question: Which letter does this sign represent?
How do you sign the letter Z?
options: Index finger traces a Z in the air.
questions.answer: Index finger traces a Z in the air.

questions.question: Which letter does this sign represent?
How do you sign the letter U?
options: Index and middle fingers up together.
Index and middle fingers spread apart.
Thumb and index finger form a U shape.
questions.answer: Index and middle fingers up together.

questions.question: Which number does this sign represent?
How do you sign the number 5?
options: Thumb, index, and middle fingers up.

questions.question: Which number does this sign represent?
How do you sign the number 4?
options: Thumb, index, and middle fingers up.

questions.question: Which number does this sign represent?
How do you sign the number 6?
options: Pinky and thumb touch, other fingers spread.
Index finger and thumb touch in a loop.
questions.answer: Pinky and thumb touch, other fingers spread.

questions.question: Which number does this sign represent?
How do you sign the number 10?
options: Index finger and thumb touch in a loop.
Thumbs-up with a small twist motion.
questions.answer: Thumbs-up with a small twist motion.

questions.question: Which number does this sign represent?
How do you sign the number 8?
options: Index and thumb touch in a loop.

questions.question: How do you sign 'Thank You' in ISL?
options: Flat hand from lips, moves forward.
questions.answer: Flat hand from lips, moves forward.

questions.question: Which greeting does this sign represent?
How do you sign 'Sorry' in ISL?
options: Flat hand from lips moves forward.

questions.question: Which greeting does this sign represent?
How do you sign 'Goodbye'?
options: Open hand, fingertips near forehead, then swing out.
Wave hand side to side with open palm.
Flat hand from lips, moves forward.
questions.answer: Wave hand side to side with open palm.

questions.question: How do you sign 'Mother'?
options: Thumb touches forehead with open hand.
Thumb touches chin with open hand.
L hand from forehead moves down.
questions.answer: Thumb touches chin with open hand.

questions.question: Which family member does this sign represent?
How do you sign 'Friend'?
options: L hand from chin moves down.
Open hand waved side to side.

questions.question: Which family member does this sign represent?
How do you sign 'Brother'?
options: L hand from chin moves down to stack on other hand.
L hand from forehead moves down to stack on other hand.
questions.answer: L hand from forehead moves down to stack on other hand.

questions.question: How do you sign 'Red'?
options: B hand shakes at shoulder level.
G hand shakes at shoulder level.
Index finger brushes down over lips.
Open hand on chest, then pull out.
questions.answer: Index finger brushes down over lips.

questions.question: Which color does this sign represent?
How do you sign 'White'?
options: Open hand on chest, then pull out to closed hand.
questions.answer: Open hand on chest, then pull out to closed hand.

questions.question: Which color does this sign represent?
How do you sign 'Yellow'?
options: B hand shakes at shoulder level.
G hand shakes at shoulder level.
Y hand shakes at shoulder level.
Open hand on chest, pull out.
questions.answer: Y hand shakes at shoulder level.
